# @ph-itdev/load-optimizer

Optimize truck load and pallet configurations using bin-packing heuristics to maximize space utilization for freight logistics.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @ph-itdev/load-optimizer
```

## Quick Start

```javascript
const {  } = require('@ph-itdev/load-optimizer');
```
